user.title: Connect to Open Filament Sensor
user.description: Enter the IP address of your OFS device (e.g. 192.168.1.25) and give it a friendly name.

camera.title: Link Printer Camera (Optional)
camera.description: Select the camera entity from your Elegoo printer integration to include snapshots in notifications.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the OFS device. Please check the IP address and ensure the device is online.

abort.already_configured: This OFS device is already configured.
